Veena Acharya

Technical Writer | Documentation Engineer | Software Engineer

I create clear, user-focused documentation that helps developers and users succeed. With 10 years of experience as a Full Stack Developer and 2 years in technical writing, I bring deep technical expertise to every documentation project.

What makes my perspective unique:

  • I speak the developer’s language. Having spent a decade writing code, I understand the challenges developers face and the documentation they need to succeed.
  • I bridge the gap between engineering and users. My development background allows me to collaborate effectively with engineering teams, ask the right technical questions, and translate complex concepts into accessible content.
  • I understand APIs from the inside out. Having built and consumed APIs as a developer, I create API documentation that is accurate, practical, and developer-friendly.

What I Do

Skill Area Expertise
API Documentation REST APIs, OpenAPI/Swagger, code samples, developer guides
User Documentation User guides, quick start guides, tutorials, how-to articles
Content Strategy Information architecture, style guides, content audits
Tools Markdown, Git/GitHub, Confluence, Postman, JSON, YAML

Featured Projects

API Documentation

  • Catty API Documentation — REST API documentation for cat food products, built with Docs-as-Code and published on GitHub Pages

Guides & Tutorials

  • Quick Start Guide — Step-by-step guide for creating Facebook posts
  • Feature Guide — Comprehensive guide to Jira features
  • User Guide — Complete user guide for WhatsApp messaging

Conceptual Documentation

  • Concept Topic — Explanatory documentation demonstrating conceptual writing

“Great documentation empowers users to succeed. That’s what drives my work every day.”
